meta.title: Paw Tag | The companion safety and wellness ecosystem
meta.description: Protect your companion with Paw Tag. Access their location, medical history, and digital documents instantly. Join the community of responsible owners.

hero.subtitle: It's not just a collar. It's a digital passport connecting medical history, location, and your unconditional love in a single tap.

beneficios.subtitle: An ecosystem designed from respect and love, providing peace of mind in every moment of the day.
beneficios.card1_desc: Whoever finds your companion only needs to bring their phone close to see your contact and location.
beneficios.card2_desc: Vaccines, allergies, and treatments instantly accessible for any veterinary emergency.
beneficios.card3_desc: Forget paperwork. Carry registration, insurance, and travel certificates in your pocket.
beneficios.card4_desc: Connect with other responsible owners, discover pet-friendly parks, and receive neighborhood alerts.

como_funciona.subtitle: Advanced technology, designed to be intuitive.
como_funciona.step1_desc: Receive your smart tag with exclusive Paw Tag design.
como_funciona.step2_desc: Bring your phone close to the tag and create your companion's profile for free.
como_funciona.step3_desc: Place it on their collar. Their vital information is now protected.

veterinarias.title: Do you own a pet-related business?
veterinarias.subtitle: Join the official Paw Tag network. Clinics, hospitals, pet shops, grooming salons, daycares, and walkers: offer your clients the most advanced identification and give an added value to your services.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about the Paw Tag ecosystem.
faq.a1: Paw Tag goes far beyond a simple tracker; it's a complete ecosystem for responsible owners. In addition to tracking technology via a "Proximity Network" (similar to other high-end trackers), it includes a complete digital medical passport. From a single app, you can manage your companion's clinical history, save important documents, and connect with an active community, all designed from love and respect for their well-being.
faq.q2: How do I link my account?
faq.a2: The process is very intuitive and takes less than a couple of minutes. You just need to download our free mobile app and create your companion's digital profile. Then, simply bring your phone close to the physical tag for the NFC technology to detect it instantly. The tag and the app will be linked immediately.
faq.q3: Does it work on any type of phone?
faq.a3: Yes, the ecosystem is designed to be fully accessible. Scanning the tag works with any modern smartphone (iOS or Android) that has an integrated NFC reader. Whoever finds your companion does not need to have the app installed to read the tag and contact you.
faq.q4: Do I need to recharge the Paw Tag medal battery?
faq.a4: No, you won't have to worry about cables or remembering to charge it every week. Paw Tag works with a standard replaceable watch battery that lasts approximately one year. When it runs out, you can easily replace it yourself at a very low cost.
faq.q5: What exactly happens when someone scans my companion's tag?
faq.a5: If your companion ever gets lost, the person who finds them only needs to bring their phone close to the medal. Doing so will instantly open an emergency screen in their browser (potentially even showing a video of you giving instructions), displaying only your essential contact information and urgent medical data to facilitate a quick and safe return home.

footer.brand_desc: Comprehensive care from love and respect for those who bring joy to our lives.
